text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Japan Cup, where Mihono Bourbon
and Tokai Teio will face off. The racecourse is
brimming with excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio confesses to Mihono Bourbon that she
experienced a lot of uneasiness during her
repeated injuries and recoveries.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she was able to remember the pure fun of
competition after watching Mihono Bourbon run
in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tokai Teio's strength makes Mihono
Bourbon want to catch up to her, just like Rice
Shower wants to catch up with her.
